objective: Normalize complete exact GHCP leaf-call accounting without paid calls
prefetch: Use only the bounded redacted schema fixture; raw .kb probes are forbidden model context and are processed outside the reasoning loop
constraints: Requested and observed route stay distinct
acceptance_criteria: Strict aiu/nano parser passes malicious fixtures
Partial or mismatched telemetry is invalid
model_tier_reason: Deterministic bounded parser work with exact tests; security boundaries are specified and escalate on schema ambiguity
escalation_triggers: Exact accounting cannot avoid float loss
